mapper.select: MATCH (v:person) WHERE id(v)==${id0} return v;
LOOKUP ON industryId YIELD industryId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON fullNameId YIELD fullNameId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON englishNameId YIELD englishNameId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON idNumberId YIELD idNumberId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON facebookId YIELD facebookId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON emailId YIELD emailId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON jobCompanyId YIELD jobCompanyId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON twitterUrlId YIELD twitterUrlId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON mobilePhoneId YIELD mobilePhoneId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON emailId YIELD emailId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON jobCompanyId YIELD jobCompanyId._src as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.fullName=="${fullName}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.englishName=="${englishName}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.industry=="${industry}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.idNumber=="${idNumber}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.facebookId=="${facebookId}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.ttUserUrl=="${twitterUrl}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.mobilePhone=="${mobilePhone}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.email=="${email}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.jobCompanyName=="${jobCompany}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${from}, ${pageSize};
LOOKUP ON person where person.fullName=="${fullName}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${n};
LOOKUP ON person where person.englishName=="${englishName}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${n};
LOOKUP ON person where person.industry=="${industry}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${n};
LOOKUP ON person where person.idNumber=="${idNumber}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${n};
LOOKUP ON person where person.facebookId=="${facebookId}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${n};
LOOKUP ON person where person.mobilePhone=="${mobilePhone}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${n};
LOOKUP ON person where person.ttUserUrl=="${twitterUrl}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${n};
LOOKUP ON person where person.email=="${email}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${n};
LOOKUP ON person where person.jobCompanyName=="${jobCompany}" YIELD vertex as v | limit ${n};
MATCH (sourceTag)-[n:englishName]->(distTag) where id(sourceTag)== ${id0} RETURN sourceTag, n, distTag limit 10;
MATCH (sourceTag)-[n:fullName]->(distTag) where id(sourceTag)== ${id0} RETURN sourceTag, n, distTag limit 10;
MATCH ()-[r:fullName{value:"${id0}"}]-(v) with distinct v as v RETURN id(v)
SHOW STATS;
CREATE edge `${s1}`(`value` string); CREATE EDGE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `${s2}` on `test`(`value`(20));
CREATE EDGE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `test_index` on `test`(`value`(20));
DROP edge INDEX `test`;
